Dungeon Survival

Assemble a party of heroes and delve into the dangerous dungeons of Black Haze. Navigate through randomly generated levels, engage in turn-based combat against monsters, collect powerful loot, and level up your heroes. Each hero has unique abilities - use them strategically to survive increasingly difficult encounters. Your goal is to reach dungeon level 5 and defeat the final boss. If all party members fall in battle, it's game over.

Arrow Keys: Navigate dungeon tiles and menu selections | Space: Confirm action / Select party member in combat | Z: Use basic attack in combat / Cancel in menus | Shift: Access skill menu in combat | Enter: Start game from title screen | ESC: Pause/Unpause game | R: Return to start screen (from game over)
